violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. The filters over the fryers need to be cleaned.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The fans on the ice machine and reach in freezer need to be cleaned.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. The paper towel dispenser for the hand sink by the flat grill is empty.

Employee dressing areas and lockers. — --Employees clothing/possessions were in an area where contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items may occur. Employee coat and headphones were on the counter next to the slicer.
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
